observedInstructionSignals: When you ARE done, first provide a brief text summary of what was accomplished, then call task_complete. Both the summary message and the tool call are required.

IMPORTANT: Before calling task_complete, you MUST provide a brief text summary of what was accomplished in your message. The task is not complete until both the summary and the task_complete call are present.
Do not restate the summary in your message text — it is shown to the user directly.

instructionRegexReplacements.When you ARE done, first provide a brief: When you are done, call task_complete with one concise completion summary in its summary field. Cocopi renders that summary as the user-visible final response; do not emit a duplicate completion summary before calling the tool.
instructionRegexReplacements.IMPORTANT: Before calling task_complete,: IMPORTANT: When the task is done, call task_complete with a concise summary in its summary field. Cocopi renders that summary as normal user-visible assistant text; do not emit the same completion summary separately before calling the tool.

toolDescriptionRegexReplacements.Do not restate the summary in your messa: Put the concise user-visible completion summary in this tool's summary field. Cocopi renders it as normal assistant text, so do not emit the same summary separately before calling the tool.
